title: ClownPierce Scythe
body:
Adds ClownPierce Boss, equipped with netherite armor and his Scythe, which drops when you defeat ClownPierce, giving you a new advancement: On ClownPierce Way!
The Scythe can be also traded with villagers and it has a special feature with right click: it launches some xp bottles to repair your armor and tools.
More coming soon! This mod is inspired by ClownPierce, a Minecraft Youtuber.
This mod is inspired by Doctor4t “Clown Scythe” mod but is NOT the same. Scythe texture is ClownPierce’s texturepack official texture for the scythe.
